title: Getting Started
description: Your complete guide to setting up and using the agent orchestration platform

sections.title: Welcome to AgentLog
sections.subtitle: Your no-code agent orchestration platform
sections.description: Build, deploy, and manage AI agents without writing code. Create powerful automation workflows that integrate with your existing tools and processes.

sections.title: 5-Minute Quick Start
sections.subtitle: Get your first agent running in minutes

steps.title: Create Account & Add API Keys
steps.description: Set up your account and configure API keys for AI providers
steps.details: Start by creating your account, then add API keys for OpenAI, Anthropic, or other AI providers

steps.title: Create Your First Agent
steps.description: Build an agent with a specific purpose and AI model configuration
steps.details: Define your agent's role, select an AI model, and configure basic parameters

steps.title: Run Test Execution
steps.description: Test your agent with sample input to see it in action
steps.details: Provide sample input and watch your agent process it in real-time

steps.description: Sign up with email or social authentication
Check your email and click the verification link
Add your name, organization, and preferences
Select from OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, or Google AI
Securely store your provider API keys
Verify keys work with a connection test
Go to the Agents section to create your first agent
Choose a clear, specific task for your agent to perform
Pick the best model for your use case (GPT-4 for complex tasks, GPT-3.5 for speed)
Set temperature, max tokens, and other behavior settings
Test your agent with simple, known inputs
Check the detailed logs to understand agent behavior
Adjust parameters based on test results
Test with various input types and scenarios

workflows.title: Customer Support Automation
workflows.description: Automate responses to customer inquiries and route complex cases
steps: Create customer support agent with helpful, professional tone
Add knowledge base functions for product information
Configure email integration for automated responses

workflows.title: Data Analysis & Reporting
workflows.description: Analyze data sets and generate comprehensive reports automatically
steps: Create data analysis agent with analytical capabilities

workflows.title: Content Creation Pipeline
workflows.description: Generate, review, and publish content across multiple channels
steps: Create content generation agent with creative parameters
Add content review and approval workflow
Configure publishing functions for different platforms

concepts.title: Agents
concepts.description: AI-powered automation units that execute tasks independently
keyPoints: Each agent has a specific purpose and configuration
Agents use AI models to make decisions and process information
Can be customized with functions and templates

concepts.title: Functions
concepts.description: Custom capabilities that extend what your agents can do
keyPoints: Connect to external APIs and services

concepts.title: Templates
concepts.description: Reusable workflows that standardize agent execution patterns
keyPoints: Define step-by-step processes for agents to follow

concepts.title: Executions
concepts.description: Individual runs of your agents with full tracking and analysis
keyPoints: Detailed logs and metrics for optimization

items.description: Integrate with your existing tools and APIs
Invite team members and organize agents
Track performance and identify optimization opportunities
Optimize costs and performance per agent
Get notified of issues and performance changes

sections.title: Success Tips
tips: 🎯 **Start Simple**: Begin with basic agents and gradually add complexity
🧪 **Test Everything**: Always test agents thoroughly before production use
📊 **Monitor Regularly**: Keep an eye on execution metrics and performance
🔄 **Iterate Often**: Continuously refine and improve your agents based on results
👥 **Collaborate**: Share successful agents and templates with your team
📚 **Stay Updated**: Check documentation regularly for new features and best practices
